meaning: n.矛,长枪,梭子鱼vt.用矛刺穿
examples: The trading of shares in Pike River has been suspended.
The hoplite has two weapons, of which the most important by far is a pike, I guess, is what we would call it.
Pike, who starred in An Education last year, was the first choice to play Skeeter, but she said no to playing the nosy journalist.
And, above all, they cringed because they knew what was coming down the pike.
So you can't tell if Pikes Peak was named for a Pike or a Pikes.
